title: Professional Relationships, Community Participation, and Consent · Cumulative Campaign Review
summary: A delayed hiring review reconstructs professional relationships, community participation, and consent from target, claim, evidence, audience, action, observation, changed case, rejected failure, repair, consent, owner, and next-decision evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for reciprocal relationship practice plan after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Map existing reciprocal relationships across work, study, community, identity-safe spaces, events, and weak ties without ranking human worth.
Make a bounded, easy-to-decline request for information, feedback, introduction, or context with purpose and time expectations.
Contribute relevant help, documentation, testing, facilitation, learning notes, or community work within actual competence and norms.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Network Map · changed case · Review Network Map
steps.instruction:
review case — Automated messages ask strangers for referrals, ignore community norms and stop signals, and measure every relationship by immediate hiring access. The review variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Map existing reciprocal relationships across work, study, community, identity-safe spaces, events, and weak ties without ranking human worth.

Which action demonstrates Network Map without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Network Map · changed case · Review Network Map.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for map existing reciprocal relationships across work, study, community, identity-safe spaces, events, and weak ties without ranking human worth. For Network Map · changed case · Review Network Map, keep Network Map connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: Automated messages ask strangers for referrals, ignore community norms and stop signals, and measure every relationship by immediate hiring access. The review variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Map existing reciprocal relationships across work, study, community, identity-safe spaces, events, and weak ties without ranking human worth.

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Network Map condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: EEOC Employment Discrimination and AI for Workers — Controls awareness that automated recruiting, screening, assessment, promotion, and pay tools can implicate protected rights and accommodation needs.

hints: For Network Map · changed case · Review Network Map, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Network Map precondition, or invariant that must hold.

The review variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Map existing reciprocal relationships across work, study, community, identity-safe spaces, events, and weak ties without ranking human worth.

For Network Map · changed case · Review Network Map, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: People without industry contacts have no professional network.

Map existing reciprocal relationships across work, study, community, identity-safe spaces, events, and weak ties without ranking human worth. Apply it to the stated input and retain a reproducible trace for reciprocal relationship practice plan.
